title: Linux Suspicious Network Traffic Redirect
description: Detects iptables or nftables modifications that redirect network traffic, which could indicate man-in-the-middle attacks or traffic interception.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*iptables -t nat -A PREROUTING*' or msg like '*iptables -t nat -A OUTPUT*' or msg like '*iptables -A FORWARD*' or msg like '*nft add rule.*dnat*' or msg like '*nft add rule.*redirect*')))
